case_title: JUSTIN QUINTAL VS. EREN CAMILLE FOSTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUINTAL, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER, EREN CAMILLE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUINTAL, JUSTIN SERVED SEP-19-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER, EREN CAMILLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTAL, JUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSTER, EREN CAMILLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 32A BLAKE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER, EREN CAMILLE
